moments.title: F1 British Grand Prix Race Day
moments.blurb: The Formula 1 Pirelli British Grand Prix concludes today at Silverstone with the main race, following practice and qualifying sessions over the weekend.

angles.name: Race Day Excitement
angles.copy: It's race day at Silverstone! Who are you backing for the win at the British Grand Prix today? #F1

angles.name: Silverstone Atmosphere
angles.copy: The roar of the engines! The British Grand Prix is underway. Soak up the atmosphere, even if you're watching from home. #F1Silverstone

moments.title: Wimbledon Enters Second Week
moments.blurb: The Wimbledon Championships continue today with the Gentlemen's and Ladies' Singles Fourth Round, as the tournament heads into its second week of action at the All England Club.

angles.name: Big Matches Today
angles.copy: Centre Court is calling! Wimbledon moves into its second week with some huge Fourth Round clashes today. Who are you watching?

angles.name: Road to the Finals
angles.copy: The grass court battle intensifies! The journey to the Wimbledon finals gets serious this week. Who's your pick for the trophy?

moments.title: Third UK Heatwave Forecast This Week
moments.blurb: A third heatwave is forecast for parts of the UK this week, with temperatures expected to reach up to 34C in the South East by Thursday or Friday, and yellow heat health alerts issued until July 11th.

angles.name: Stay Hydrated
angles.copy: Another UK heatwave is on the way! Temperatures could hit 34C this week. Stay safe, stay cool, and drink plenty of water.

angles.name: Hosepipe Bans
angles.copy: With the heatwave building, hosepipe bans are in effect in parts of Kent, Hampshire and the Isle of Wight. Every drop counts!

moments.title: ICC Women's T20 World Cup Continues
moments.blurb: England is currently hosting the ICC Women's T20 World Cup, which runs until July 15th, bringing top-tier international cricket action to home soil.

angles.name: World Cup Action
angles.copy: The ICC Women's T20 World Cup is in full swing across England! Who are you cheering on?

angles.name: Home Soil Advantage
angles.copy: England is hosting the Women's T20 World Cup until July 15th. Let's show our support for the teams competing for glory!

moments.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 Knockout Stages
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 is now in its knockout stages, building towards the final on July 19th in New Jersey, USA.

angles.name: World Cup Fever
angles.copy: World Cup fever is building! We're deep into the knockout stages now. Which teams are looking like champions?

angles.name: Final Countdown
angles.copy: The World Cup final is just two weeks away! Who do you think will make it to New Jersey on July 19th?

moments.title: Happy 76th Birthday, Huey Lewis
moments.blurb: Huey Lewis, the charismatic frontman of Huey Lewis and The News, celebrates his 76th birthday today.

angles.name: It's Huey's Day
angles.copy: Happy 76th Birthday to the one and only Huey Lewis! What's your favourite Huey Lewis and The News track?

angles.name: Power of Love
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 76th birthday to Huey Lewis! Still 'The Power of Love' after all these years.

moments.title: Happy 67th Birthday, Marc Cohn
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning singer-songwriter Marc Cohn, known for his hit 'Walking in Memphis', turns 67 today.

angles.name: Walking in Memphis
angles.copy: Happy 67th Birthday to the incredible Marc Cohn! Still walking in Memphis with that timeless voice.

angles.name: Singer-Songwriter Legend
angles.copy: Celebrating Marc Cohn's 67th birthday today! A true singer-songwriter legend. What's your favourite of his songs?

moments.title: Happy 57th Birthday, RZA
moments.blurb: RZA, the influential leader of the Wu-Tang Clan and accomplished producer, celebrates his 57th birthday today.

angles.name: Wu-Tang Leader
angles.copy: Happy 57th Birthday to the legendary RZA! The mastermind behind the Wu-Tang Clan.

angles.name: Hip Hop Icon
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 57th birthday to RZA, one of hip hop's most iconic figures! What's your favourite Wu-Tang track?

moments.title: Love Supreme Jazz Festival Closes
moments.blurb: Europe's largest outdoor summer jazz festival, Love Supreme, concludes today at Glynde Place, East Sussex, after a weekend of music.

angles.name: Jazz Festival Vibes
angles.copy: The final day of Love Supreme Jazz Festival! Who caught some incredible sets in East Sussex this weekend?

angles.name: Sunday Sounds
angles.copy: Sunday sounds at Love Supreme! Wrapping up a fantastic weekend of jazz, soul, and funk. What a vibe!

moments.title: Lytham Festival Ends Today
moments.blurb: Lytham Festival, a major music event on the Lancashire coast, concludes its 2026 run today after a week of headline acts.

angles.name: Lytham Finale
angles.copy: It's the final day of Lytham Festival! Who's been there soaking up the atmosphere and incredible music this week?

angles.name: Lancashire's Big Gig
angles.copy: Lytham Festival wraps up today! What were your highlights from Lancashire's biggest music event?

moments.title: England Men's Cricket vs India (3rd T20I)
moments.blurb: England Men's cricket team will play India in the third Vitality IT20 match of their five-match series in Nottingham on Tuesday, July 7th.

angles.name: T20 Battle
angles.copy: Next up for England Cricket: the 3rd Vitality IT20 against India in Nottingham on Tuesday! Who's ready for more action?

angles.name: Nottingham Cricket
angles.copy: Big game coming to Nottingham! England take on India in the T20 series this Tuesday. Get ready!

moments.title: BST Hyde Park Continues
moments.blurb: American Express presents BST Hyde Park is ongoing in London, featuring global headline artists and running until July 12th.

angles.name: Hyde Park Live
angles.copy: BST Hyde Park is still bringing the biggest names to London! Who are you hoping to see live this week?

angles.name: Summer in the City
angles.copy: London is buzzing with BST Hyde Park! Fantastic music and summer vibes continuing until July 12th.

moments.title: Trying Season 5 Premieres
moments.blurb: The fifth season of the heartwarming British comedy-drama 'Trying' premieres globally on Apple TV+ on Wednesday, July 8th.

angles.name: New Trying
angles.copy: Get ready for more laughs and tears! Trying Season 5 arrives on Apple TV+ this Wednesday. Who's excited?

angles.name: British Comedy Back
angles.copy: The beloved British comedy-drama 'Trying' is back for its fifth season on July 8th. Time to get binging!

moments.title: Happy 86th Birthday, Ringo Starr
moments.blurb: Legendary Beatles drummer Ringo Starr will celebrate his 86th birthday on Tuesday, July 7th.

angles.name: Fab Four Drummer
angles.copy: A huge Happy 86th Birthday to the iconic Ringo Starr on Tuesday! What's your favourite Beatles track he sang on?

angles.name: Peace & Love
angles.copy: Wishing Ringo Starr a very happy 86th birthday this Tuesday! Peace and Love, always.

moments.title: The Dark Premieres on ITV
moments.blurb: The new Scottish-set murder drama 'The Dark', starring Laura Donnelly, is set to premiere on ITV and ITVX on July 12th.

angles.name: New Scottish Drama
angles.copy: A chilling new murder drama, 'The Dark', premieres on ITVX this Sunday, July 12th. Set in the Scottish wilderness – looks gripping!

angles.name: Must-Watch Thriller
angles.copy: Your next Sunday night obsession? 'The Dark' is a brand new thriller coming to ITV and ITVX on July 12th. Don't miss it!

moments.title: Ann Droid Premieres on BBC
moments.blurb: Diane Morgan stars in the new quirky BBC comedy 'Ann Droid', which premieres on BBC One and iPlayer on July 11th.

angles.name: New Comedy Alert
angles.copy: Diane Morgan's new comedy 'Ann Droid' lands on BBC One and iPlayer this Saturday, July 11th! Get ready for some laughs.

angles.name: Quirky New Show
angles.copy: Looking for a new comedy? 'Ann Droid' promises witty, offbeat humour from Diane Morgan, starting July 11th on BBC.

moments.title: Kaleidoscope Festival at Alexandra Palace
moments.blurb: Alexandra Palace's Kaleidoscope Festival returns on Saturday, July 11th, promising a day of music, comedy, and arts.

angles.name: Ally Pally Festival
angles.copy: Kaleidoscope Festival is back at Alexandra Palace this Saturday, July 11th! Who's heading to Ally Pally for the music and views?

angles.name: Summer Festival Fun
angles.copy: Get ready for a day of festival fun! Kaleidoscope Festival brings music, comedy & more to Alexandra Palace this Saturday.

moments.title: England Men's Cricket vs India (2nd ODI in Cardiff)
moments.blurb: England Men's cricket team will face India in the second One Day International match of their series in Cardiff on Thursday, July 16th.

angles.name: Cricket in Cardiff
angles.copy: Big cricket coming to Cardiff! England Men take on India in the 2nd ODI at Sophia Gardens on July 16th. Get your tickets!

angles.name: Wales Hosts England
angles.copy: Wales hosts international cricket! England vs India in a One Day International in Cardiff on Thursday, July 16th. Don't miss out!

moments.title: The Light In The Hall: Still Waters on Channel 4
moments.blurb: The second series of the Welsh drama noir 'The Light In The Hall: Still Waters' is currently available to watch on Channel 4.

angles.name: Welsh Drama Noir
angles.copy: Binged 'The Light In The Hall: Still Waters' yet? The gripping Welsh drama noir is on Channel 4 now!

angles.name: Still Waters Run Deep
angles.copy: Catch up on the second series of 'The Light In The Hall: Still Waters' on Channel 4 – a fantastic Welsh production!

moments.title: Scottish Schools on Summer Holidays
moments.blurb: Summer school holidays have begun in Scotland around July 2nd, with pupils now enjoying their break.

angles.name: Schools Out Scotland
angles.copy: Summer holidays are officially here for Scottish schools! Enjoy the break, everyone!

angles.name: Holiday Fun
angles.copy: What are your plans for the Scottish school summer holidays? Let us know what fun you're having!
